description: The histogram uses wildly inconsistent bin widths — some bins span only €0.5M while others span €3.0M or even €5.5M — yet all bars are rendered at the same visual width. This makes the wider bins (like €5.0M–€8.0M and €8.0M–€13.5M) appear disproportionately tall because they accumulate far more data points over their larger ranges, giving a misleading impression of the price distribution's shape and density.
